headline: Codezela Technologies wins Best Email Marketing Company

content.text: Codezela Technologies and the award record

Codezela Technologies is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of Best Email Marketing Company. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for Codezela Technologies, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

Official and company sources support Codezela as a digital and software services company. This row records the Best Email Marketing Company award. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.
Why the Best Email Marketing Company record matters

The Best Email Marketing Company recognition places Codezela Technologies in the GBE previous winners archive for 2025. For a prospective customer, partner, journalist, or award researcher, the practical value of this page is a clean public record: who received the award, what the award was called, and which source trail was reviewed before publication.
